address:
1881,11th Main
39th Cross Rd, 4th T Block East, Jayanagar, 560041
name: 1966 Mumbai Cafe
reviews_list: Vadapav and misal pav tasted heavenly.We tried biriyani and poha as well and it wasn?t up to the mark of Mumbai taste.The place is hygienic and well maintained. Just a heads up : there is no car parking; A new hangout spot in the city. They have limited options but are worth the flavours. Tried Mumbai vadapav and Spicy paneer vada pav. Both the dishes were palatable and pocket friendly.

address: No. 1/3, Sumeru Enclave, 275, 9th A Main, 2nd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Isobel Cafe
reviews_list: Had great coffee along with delicious pizza. Nice place to hangout with friends and partner. Wang served our table and he was very polite and professional.; Lovely atmosphere and great coffee! I?ve been back twice now for their oat milk latte.

address:
#21/83, S E
nd Rd, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru
name: Friends Adda/ Bun Gudi
reviews_list: Known for their Bun Butter Congress and Sabakki bun butter congress. Tried their Sangamam juice a citrus mix juice that was interesting. They do sell various other snacks and beverages check them out too.

address: Kothnur Main Rd, Puttenahalli, JP Nagar 7th Phase, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Mysore tatte idly point
reviews_list: Excellent Food taste ;Ordered thatte idly and vada , simply chumma to that idly, it was so soft and sambar chutney awesome; Nice place to have breakfast. Puliyogare is next level, Thatte idli

address: 185, ?ISHTA? ? 1st Floor, 17th Main Rd, Siddanna Layout, Banashankari Stage II, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Kaapi Kendra
reviews_list: he cafe is clean and food seems to be prepared with quality in mind. This place serves on South Indian dishes, specilizing in dosas and Coffee. Coffee tasted very good, though a bit on the thinner side.; The best idlys and the most amazing sambar in this locality. It's always very crowded. That's because of their amazing taste, be it idly, vada or rava dose whatever u buy there, nothing will disappoint you anyday. an idly lover's must visit place.

address: No.320/2, 14th cross, Sampige Rd, Kodandarampura, Malleshwaram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560003
name: Eat Raja Juice Bar
reviews_list: Great idea by the team of having no waste out of fruits. Very impressive to see that the containers are nothing but cut fruits. Cleanliness can be improved. Sugarless options need to be introduced.; The concept of serving juice in shells and fruit is quite unique.Took combo juice.Coco Dragon and Sita phala were nice. Sapota was okayish.Good to see that they are doing their best to reduce use of plastic.

address: 764/44, 37th Cross, 18th main road, 4th T  Block East, Jayanagar
name: Aamchi Dilli
reviews_list: Aamchi Dilli restaurant, Jayanagar. It? Delhi & Mumbai style Indian Street Food restaurant, self-service order it and pay first and then collect the dishes from respective counters. It is well organized token numbers. We had dinner on , and it? busy place. The food is good and the rates are reasonable.I'll consider it in future and recommend it. Please be careful with your parking.; A one stop place for all Delhi and Mumbai street food. You can visualise this place as a hygienic and sophisticated lorry (thela).Best part is they will tell you the approximate time they are going to take for dishes requiring longer time to prepare so that you can decide either to wait or order something else.Portion is standard. Pocket friendly.

address: Shop No. 1632, Srinivasnagar, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560050
name: Panchami Chats
reviews_list: Good place for chats,Juices and North Indian dishes.At reasonable price. ; This is on of the popular place in our area srinivasnagar for juice and chats and evening snacks. I have been visiting this place from past 10years, this place used serve best pav bhaji and Gobi manchoori.They serve all kinds of snacks and juice for best price. Taste has come down but still good for it's price in this area.

address: 36, 10th Cross Rd, Kadarenahalli, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Kunigal Thatte Idly
reviews_list: Extremely tasty food!! Authentic south Indian Thatte Idli and vada. The Ghee rice with Khurma was very tasty too!! You can refill the two chutneys and khurma for (rice) unlimited number of times with the self refill counter. Prices are very reasonable too!; Very soft Thatte idli & Vada is just outstanding. Green chutney is spicy & I just loved it. Veg Pulao was ok but idli chutney is a must try dish here

address: 10th Main Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Madhavan Park Bajji Cart
reviews_list: One of the best bajji centers in Banglore. Must Try capsicum and balekaayi masala you'll 100% love it. For a chill evening this place is match made in heaven for foodies!!; The capsicum bajji with masala and onions were so yummy. Must try snacks place in jaya agar. Also the price was reasonable.

address: GK Arcade, 125/1/18, Ashoka Pillar Rd, 1st Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Dakshin Thindi
reviews_list: Ghee Masala Dosa - Excellent, crisp, golden brown, fantastic taste and texture. Fair amount of ghee. We tried the Pudi Plain as well, and Fantastic. Rather than going to the super priced, over crowded Rameshwaram Cafe, this place can be an excellent choice. You also can get a Parking spot here!; Dosas were crispy and on point, just like the ones at Bangalore cafe, and so were the vadas, Only not a fan of malige thatte idly served with gatti chutney.

address: Cosmopolitan Club, 22nd Cross Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Chutney Chang
reviews_list: This was a pleasant experience for the family. Very nice ambiance to go with good quality food. There? plethora of options to choose from both in vegetarian and non vegetarian dishes. It was interesting to see that there were no mushroom recipes not even in soups too. We went on a Sunday evening and I wonder why it wasn? crowded for the hugest seating space available. There? good music playing on the overhead speakers to give company for scrumptious meal. Definitely recommended to visit here.

address: 856, Ramanjaneya Rd, Kalappa Block, Srinagar, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560050
name: Sri Mahadeshwara Mushroom Dum Biryani
reviews_list: It's opposite to Srinagar bus stop as we had been there in the afternoon it was too crowded. We tried Mushroom Biryani (it didn't have any extraordinary taste but normal taste with mild spicy), Palak Gobi(It was delicious and flavourful and a must try dish). Prices are reasonable for the quantity and quality they provide and they have a special menu like ghee rice during weekends.

address: 18th Main Rd, Anjanaswamy Layout, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Samruddhi Gobi Center
reviews_list: Both dry and regular Gobi taste great. But the problem is the service at peak hours. You need to wait a lot and when it gets out of control and it usually does, they just make random amounts of everything and distribute to whichever customer can get their hands on it. So you'll end up eating whatever is made instead of eating whatever you want to.; It's a small shop without any place to sit. Food is good for the price. Palak Gobi is the only new thing to try here

address: 66, 10th Main Rd, 4th Block, 5th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: La Pino'z Pizza
reviews_list: Highly recommend this pizza joint if you're looking for some great pizza and garlic bread!Must try their 7 cheese pizza, it's something you might have never experienced . ; I orderd paneer butter masala regular pizza and mushrooms olives cheese quesadillas paid 470-/INR. Pizza cost me 270-/INR, pizza was decent in taste no wow factor was there in taste. As per the pricing pizza was soo average in taste and size.

address: Jagruthi Colony, Puttenahalli, Phase 7, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Mr.Gobi
reviews_list: Mr.Gobi is certainly one of the best places to have Dry Gobi. This is a small chat centre hardly a place to sit but the owner (Sumitra Aunt) hospitality amazes you.; A small eating joint nestled in the neighborhood serving dry Gobi. They have a very limited menu of regular Gobi, palak Gobi, curry leaves Gobi, paneer dry and french fries. French fries wasn't available during our visit. We tried the regular Gobi and curry leaves Gobi and both were good.

address: 25, 9th Cross, 34th Main Rd, near Indira Gandhi Circle, ITI Layout, 1st Phase, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Prasidhi Food Corner
reviews_list: This place serving authentic South Indian food . Weekend will be crowded as usual . I tried ghee podi masala dosa , button idli with drumstick sambar was deadly combination. Ghee podi idli with chutney was amazing . You also get Kara bath, kesaribath, rice bath , pongal and sweet pongal and much more . For lunch u get different menu like akki rotti, ragi rotti , mini meals etc. in desserts gulab jamun was my favourite. I end my breakfast with best filter coffee .; Easily spottable breakfast spot in Jp nagar, this is a place you can try out for some delicious breakfast with a huge variety! Loved the ghee dose, paddu and Thatte idlly! They also have combo meals, filter coffee, juices and more! Check it out !

address: 1291, 25th Main Rd, Putlanpalya, Jayanagara 9th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560069
name: Rajvardhan Foods
reviews_list: This place offers good . Maharashtrian style dishes and is more of a shop by the road where we have limited plastic chairs/tables and may need to stand and eat at times. Parking can be a hassle, please plan accordingly. We tried their misal pav, pav bhaji, poori bhaji with shrikand, sabudana khichdi and poha. All of these dishes were quite spicy and flavourful. Shrikhand had a thick consistency and wasn't too sweet. The pooris were a little doughy and hard, felt slightly uncooked.quality Prices are economical. Decent place to stop over if around the area.; A modest take away place in Jayanagar that has been serving Maharashtrian cuisine for over 15 years. Items like vada pav, dabeli, thalipeeth, sabudana vada, khichdi, etc. are served here. I have been coming here occasionally for a number of years. And I have to say that some still have the same flavour and quality.

address: 329, 10th A Main Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Kapoor's Cafe
reviews_list: Visited a bustling spot recently thankfully, we snagged a table upon entry due to the frequent crowds. Service was consistently quick and friendly, no complaints there. Our starters, gobi pakoda and cheese corn fingers, were delicious. However, the overall experience was marred by steep prices, especially for the winter special.; If you want to experience typical Punjabi atmosphere and food in Bengaluru this cafe is one the best option ! Interior n ambiance of hotel is really amazing! Service is prompt n staff is polite ... Kids will enjoy n love this place due to attractive lighting n ambiance !

address: 21/1, 10th Cross, Sampige Rd, Malleshwaram, Bengaluru, 560002
name: Shyamji's Chole Bhature
reviews_list: Although Chaas was good in taste. They have other Delhi's signature dishes like Chole Samosa, kachodi etc. The chole was tasty. ;Bhature is good but chole is not matching the hype. But overall it's a good option to try once.

address: 146, 6th C Main Road, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Kedias Fun Food
reviews_list: Its a very famous and old shop selling variety of parathas and snacks. We tried there kachori sabji and puri sabzi . Both were just awesome in taste. A must try for evening as well as morning breakfast. They have many combos too of Paratha and rice that are a must try.The price is very apt . The combos start for 80Rs. A must visit place.; The food is tasty, hygienic and there? consistency in the flavours. I have been going here for 10 years now and I take all of my friends and family here

address: 22/1, Police Station Rd, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: By2Coffee
reviews_list: Good food. Affordable. The chutney is good. The vade is crispy. Masala dose is crispy good but not exceptional in terms of flavour. Quick service on weekdays. No place to sit and eat just stand on the footpath.; Waah I really enjoyed the south indian breakfast. One of the best Chutney dip Idli i had in the recent past. Dosa is the best. kara batch can be batter. bought Aloo chips super yummy taste- after MTR spicy chips again i saw here.

address: 10th Cross Rd, Yalappa Garden, Malleshwaram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560003
name: Shivaji Chats
reviews_list: One of the oldest chats center of Malleshwaram serving since 35+years.; The taste of snacks was really too good. I tried samosa chat, masala puri, Pani puri, sev puri and most unique recipe of this snack center is crazy receipe. The taste was really good in all ways like salt, spice and sour and sweet. Everything was perfect. Must visit this place whenever you visit Malleswaram. The landmark for this shop is MTR shop. The price is also worth.

address: 38/4, Ground Floor, 8th F Main Rd, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Pailwan Pulao
reviews_list: The prices are affordable but the quantity is too low, a better pricing with a good quantity would be appreciated. Southindian food for lunch is the only option I can decide within a second.Curd rice is my fav and it tasted so homely, so sufficient. The entire meal costed less than ?200 and I'm stuffed already.Custard box looks cute and tastes tasty.Buttermilk came so fresh and yum.Gravy I felt could be better whereas coconut chutney is so good.Order now and enjoy

address: 7th Cross Rd, NR Colony, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560019
name: Hotel Dwarka
reviews_list: Old is gold, old is legacy, old is tasty!All of these hold good for Hotel Dwaraka. Their iconic benne khali is still relevant, is still the best. With chutney just keep flowing in the plate, soaking the dose, the taste is always heavenly. A cup of an amazing filter coffee is a perfect ending to this savoring journey. ; An old restaurant.  If you are looking forward to having Rava Vada then they are available only in the evening so plan accordingly.

address: 17th Cross Rd, 5th Phase, JP Nagar Phase 5, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Raja Gobi
reviews_list: If you are in and around JP Nagar 5th phase ,you must have heard about this place .Our last visit was way back in time ,but now everything has changed here . We have to stand in queue (typical waiting period is 1 hour ) to get the Gobi . The Gobi tastes just like restaurant style . I just felt it's just hype that has made this shop popular.(just my opinion) For us it's just another good Gobi Manchurian in the neighbourhood (as this is not our first visit ). If you are in the neighbourhood just visit the shop once and drop your reviews . The quantity is really heavy for 1 person ,so I suggest buying 1 plate and sharing with 2 people is good enough . ; Honest review: After waiting for 1 hour in the queue, I finally received my Gobi Manchurian. The taste was above average, but not worth the 1-hour wait. The place seemed hygienic compared to other street food stalls, but street food is street food in the end. While waiting in the queue, I noticed they were cleaning the utensils from time to time.

address: 143, Diagonal Rd, near Minerva circle, Parvathipuram, Vishweshwarapura,,Basavanagudi Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: New Modern Hotel
reviews_list: Masala dosa is always my favorite one. ; The food was quite good

address: Rangarao Rd, near Shankar Mutt Road, Shankarapura, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Brahmins' Coffee Bar
reviews_list: Great food. Idlys are softest you can ever find. But the lack of seating space makes this place viable to stress and difficulty. Parking is tough if you have four wheeler. And prices are rock high. 20rs/piece of idli. Coffee is great as well. ; One of the older restaurants in south Bangalore. This is the original Brahmin? coffee Bar. Subsequently many places with same name have started in Bangalore though they are not related.

address: 373/1, 10th Cross Rd, 2nd Block, Jaya Nagar East, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Namma SLN Veg
reviews_list: This restaurant operates on a self-service basis, offering fantastic authentic Bengaluru cuisine. The special Sabbakki Soppu dosa, idly, and pulav rice bath are truly impressive. Despite its small size, the restaurant is often crowded. Four-wheeler parking is available. I particularly enjoyed the filter coffee to conclude my morning breakfast, recommended by a colleague after a refreshing walk.; We tried their Thatte Idly which was soft and served with chutney and a bit of sagu. The taste was really good. Next we had the Ghee Podi Dosa which had lots of podi. The taste was good. The chutney here is really good.

address: 78A, 36th "A' cross, 2nd Main Rd, 7th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Dhanyam Cafe
dish_liked: Masala Dosa, Idly, Kharabath, Sajige, All Healthy Foods
reviews_list: This adorable spot called Dhanyam Cafe totally won me over! Even though I wasn't a big fan of South Indian cuisine before, their food is simply heavenly.This place just stole my heart with its beautiful ambiance and the incredible taste of their dishes. What's amazing is that they serve top-notch quality food and you can get anything you ask for at really reasonable prices. Check out these pics? mean, just look at how delicious everything looks! I'm definitely coming back for more?t's a vibe! ; We ordered the Ragi Idli which is served with chutney and sambar. The Ragi Idly was delicious especially with the chutney. The chutney was simple yet flavorful. The sambar was good if not great, it was a lot thicker than other places.

address: Gandhi Bazaar Main Rd, Gandhi Bazaar, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Dwarkamai
reviews_list: Highly recommended!!Visited twice last week with friends and cousins. Loved everything about it, and really good service. Best place for vegetarian foodies. They have a lot of variety of food option and decent food quantity. Must try any of the tandoori starters and their signature dish Bamboo biriyani. ; If you are going to Gandhi Bazaar for shopping and looking for best veg restaurant this is definitely a must visit place and it? a award winning restaurant.

address: Trulife, Mahabodhi Hospital Compound, Lalbagh Siddapura Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Arekempanahalli, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Cafe Amudham
reviews_list: An easily accessible outlet, close to Lalbagh. Service, food quality and taste is as you would find in a similar Tindi across South Bangalore. I liked the thick, groovy and textured chutneys, coconut mint, tomato and another green flavor.; Overall, good place to grab a quick bite, and use the outdoor seating area.

address: 101, Ground floor, 1/1, 10th cross, KKP main road, opposite Blue dart courier, 7th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560059
name: Just Chole Bhature
reviews_list: Located on the main road of Jayanagar. It has less seating space which is outside the shop i.e on the footpath. We ordered chole bhature, paneer parota, Dhabeli, ulta vada pav and Pani puri. All items were good

address: Venezia, #12, 32nd Cross Rd, 7th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Venezia
dish_liked: Pasta, Cheese Cigar Roll, Crispy Ravioli
reviews_list: Recently visited Venezia in Jayanagar and had an exceptional experience indulging in authentic Italian cuisine. The delightful ambiance adds to the charm, while the top-notch food quality truly stood out. Don't miss the rooftop seating area ·a perfect spot to chill with family and friends. Highly recommend for a memorable dining experience!

address:
6
8/150/4, Second Floor, 9th Main Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Now Boarding Cafe
reviews_list: A really good place if you wanna spend time with your friends or family. They have hundreds of games to play which are really fun and enjoyable! They charge 100 per person per hour and you can play one game per hour. Avoid going on weekends as it is crowded. Food is also delicious.

address: 12, 1st Main Rd, 4 E Block, NR Colony, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: HELLO! Dose Master
reviews_list: A small place with clean and neat interiors. All types of dosas, sweets and other options available all only in veg. ; Hello! Dosa Master is located in Basavanagudi just opposite South Kitchen. It is from the same franchise. There is no seating arrangement here. The menu is limited.

address: 21, 11th Cross Rd, Malleshwaram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560003
name: Amrith Ice Cream
dish_liked: Roasted Almond with Super Chocolate, Fruit Salad With Ice Cream
reviews_list: Amrith Ice Cream in Malleshwaram is a delightful ice cream parlor. Their Amrith Special, where you can select three additional scoops of ice cream along with vanilla, is a brilliant concept. I tried the Mango Cone Ice Cream, which was a perfect blend of creaminess and mango flavor, and the Triple Fantasy, which lived up to its name with it dreamy taste. ;I went to this ice cream shop first time , good , decent, premium quality ice I willl say.

address: 5th Cross Rd, Gayathri Devi Park Extension, Kodandarampura, Malleshwaram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560003
name: Sri Sai Ram Chats and Juice
reviews_list: Great place which offers chats. They even have dry chats like different varieties of chips which is then prepared to dry chats. The owner is friendly. The price is reasonable. There are plenty of options for dry chats. Must visit place if your in Malleswaram

address: 2nd Floor, 281, 15th Cross Rd, 5th Phase, KR Layout, JP Nagar Phase 6, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Sattvam
reviews_list: The place had an amazing vibe right from its entrance. Lighting and colorful decor energize anyone entering the place.The staff was attentive, friendly, and clearly passionate about sharing their love of sattvic food with their guests. Every dish was the care and attention to detail.I visited for dinner & tried their pure veg buffet, free from onion & garlic.; My rating for current experience is 5/5.Rating in different departments is as follows.Food - 5/5 Service - 5/5 Ambiance - 5/5 Drinks - 5/5

address: 33, 36th Cross Rd, 4th T Block East, Jayanagara 9th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560041
name: Eshanya Street Food Cafe
reviews_list: Discovering hidden gems in Jayanagar, Bangalore Recently explored this amazing rooftop cafe and I must say, the sandwich here is absolutely mind-blowing! But let's talk about their sizzlers – hands down the best I've ever tasted Follow me for more mouth-watering content and let's explore the foodie paradise together!

address: 71, 8th C Main Road, 4th T Block East, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Anantha
reviews_list: It’s a pure vegetarian restaurant in first floor, new restaurant with good ambience. Food is delicious, prices are decent, staffs are friendly, service was quick. We had been for lunch on a week day so not much crowded. Chats available in the ground floor during evening. No 4 wheeler parking, roadside parking available for 2 wheelers. Party hall is also available.

address: 1st Block, 7 Block, Kanakapura Rd, 1st Block, 7th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560082
name: Ramanna Chats
reviews_list: One of the oldest chaat stalls in Bangalore. Ramanna has been here over 25+ yrs and till date happily interacts with customers and there to make the South Indian chaats. The taste here is very different and consistent over years.

address: 112, Gandhi Bazaar Main Rd, Gandhi Bazaar, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Baisakhi
reviews_list: Indulging in the rich flavors of Punjab at Baisakhi, a delightful vegetarian restaurant in Bangalore. From the comforting sarso da saag to the crispy makke di roti, every bite is a celebration of Punjabi cuisine. If you're craving authentic Punjabi and North Indian food, this is the place to be! The vibrant ambiance and mouth-watering dishes make it a must-visit for all food enthusiasts. Get ready to experience a burst of flavors that will leave your taste buds dancing with joy. Baisakhi is where tradition meets innovation, and every dish tells a story of love and passion for food.

address: 172, Kavi Lakshmisha Rd, opp. to Jain College, Parvathipuram, Vishweshwarapura, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Bob Street Outlet
reviews_list: Bob Street excels in offering a pocket-friendly vegetarian feast with 100+ options spanning Chinese, Italian, Tandoori, milkshakes, and mojitos – all under 200 INR. Despite the affordability, the restaurant impressively maintains top-notch quality and taste. From flavorful Tandoori dishes to refreshing drinks, Bob Street is a go-to spot for diverse cravings, ensuring a delightful culinary experience without burning a hole in your pocket

address: 55, 30th Cross Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Jayanagar 3rd Block East, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Charcoal Veg Grill
reviews_list: Prime location. Good atmosphere. Best service. Welcome drink is best. Awesome taste of starters and white sauce pasta. Moderate taste of maincourse. Few menu items are not available today may be in weekday. Decent menu served on tables. Not exact buffet.... over all good. They offered complementary cake for bday cutting thanks for that... Best approach and well serviced by them.

address: 66/1 1st floor 33rd cross, above Ajfan dates, 7th Main Rd, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Food Springs
reviews_list: Very good pan Pan Asian place which also has a jain option with a reasonable price in Jayanagar .; The restaurant is in the first floor and can accommodate around 50 people at once . Washroom was clean even when the restaurant was jam packed

address: 24, CJ Venkatesh Das Rd, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name:
Brahma B
owl
reviews_list: The Brahma Bowl in Banashankari provides a unique self-service experience, priding itself on creating dishes without the use of taste makers or artificial flavors – a commendable aspect. During our visit, we sampled two dishes: the paneer pepper dry and hakka noodles, along with a soup.

address: 311, 33rd Main Rd, opp. FRANK PUBLIC SCHOOL, JP Nagar 6th Phase, KR Layout,Bengaluru.
name: Sandwich Guru
reviews_list: We had 2 sandwichs, Paneer corn cheese sandwich and paneer butter masala sandwich. Both were good and the first one was excellent. They also have beverages., tried cold badam and hot badam. That was good too. This place is open from 8 AM to 12 PM in the night. So in case you don't want to have dinner and eat something light. This place is best. Even for evening snacks I would recommend this place. Overall good place for sandwich lovers.

address: 6th Block, 3rd Stage, Outer Ring Road, Banashakari
name: Naidu Tiffins
reviews_list: One of early breakfast place in Bangalore. They start by 3:00 am in the morning and you get Idli, vada, mushroom biriyani and variety of Dose(dosa). You also get coffee and tea along with smokes. So when you run out of smokes you can get from them. I have given 4 star

address: 97, sri sai plaza, 21st Main Rd, Siddanna Layout, Banashankari Stage II, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Brahmana prasadam
reviews_list: If you are confused about where to have your lunch, which would be yum as well as worth visiting to it, this will be the place for you all.The quality & taste of the food was so good, especially I loved their rasam. What they server for ?200 is more than worth having here, also the hygiene was well maintained and totally loved their authenticity of serving in banana leaf.

address: No. 37, Aster RV Hospital Campus, 24th Main Rd, 1st Phase, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Paakashala
reviews_list: Been missing restaurants serving Bangalore kind of freshly cooked tasty food. Visited Paakashala hotel yesterday after couple of months, was pleasant surprised to find that there has been no decline in quality of their food. Can say they better than their best too. clean and relaxing place for a family dine in, with no hassle of car parking or walking long distance after car parking.

address:
16th Cross Road, Sampige Rd 
Malleshwaram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560003
name: Sri Sai Baba Sandwich
reviews_list: Nestled amidst the vibrant streets of Malleswaram, there exists an iconic sandwich haven that has carved its name as the unrivaled champion of culinary delight - the renowned road side sandwich shop. This unassuming culinary shrine stands tall, a beacon of gastronomic excellence, drawing in throngs of loyal patrons who seek nothing short of sandwich perfection

address: 2, 111/112, 2nd Floor, 100 Feet Road, Outer Ring Rd, Banashankari 3rd Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560085
name: Kake dihatti
reviews_list: Unique and eye-catching decor, definitely made the place memorable. Decent ambience, good for a relaxed meal or casual drinks. Food was tasty and enjoyable, no complaints there.

address: 38/1, Sannidhi Rd, NR Colony, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Cool Corner
reviews_list: Food is reasonably good, although bit expensive for the quantity.Would recommend the pizza the most. They also have good cake and hot chocolate fudge, cake fudge's quantity is enough to feed two people if you're not eating only the fudge. Sandwich tasted good but lacked in the filling with paneer. If your taking stuff like sandwiches or pizzas the wait time will be a bit high though.

address: 1st floor 81,8th cross, Dattatreya temple street, 8th Cross Rd, Malleshwaram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560003
name: Basaveshwar Khanavali
reviews_list: I had my dinner here. It’s an unlimited meal, so you can have how much ever roti and rice you can have. The staffs are friendly. Do not get irritated while serving food. In fact they want us to enjoy their meal. The food was great, quality is super high. I suggest you people to have this meal in noon as lunch.Cozy ambience

address: 56/1, Sri Krishna Towers, 9th Main Rd, 5th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560041
name: Thyme & Whisk
dish_liked: Mocktails, Broccoli and Almonds, All healthy items
reviews_list: A great veg restaurant. Good for families and friends. The place can get noisy and crowded so that shows the belief of folks on the quality of the food. The service is quick and they don’t serve alcohol. Varied cuisine helps in choosing a few dishes in each cuisine. Loved the pizza and garlic bread.Take time and better to call ahead and reserve the table.

address: Next to Kalyani Magnum Tech Park, JP Nagar 4th Phase, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Hunger Camp
reviews_list: Hunger camp is one of the best family restaurants in JP Nagar, Bengaluru. The ambience of restaurant is very unique, based on military theme. Kids will enjoy a lot. The seating arrangement, lights, menu, ambience is based on military theme. The food is very good, less oily and pricing is decent. The staff are very courteous, service is fast. If you are in a large group ask for basement setup, which is more kick-axx. The only problem is limited car parking and no valet service. Enough space available for two wheeler parking.

address: 16, Outer Ring Rd, beside Domino's, 3rd Phase, Phase 3, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560085
name: Gulp
reviews_list: I recently visited Gulp Cocktail and Kitchen, a newly opened bar and kitchen. I was immediately impressed by the beautiful interior, which is stylish and yet inviting. The ambience is perfect for a romantic dinner or a night out with friends.

address: 63 Panduranga Nagar, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: TFG Cafe
reviews_list: Love love love everything about this cafe.It’s quaint, cute and has a charming vibe. Their hospitality was so good and food, oh my god!! It was delicious Our stomach and heart both were full. They fed us till we dropped. Every dish served on the table was mouth watering. I personally loved hummus and lavash with my apple beetroot carrot drink

address: 616/2, 31st Cross, 10th A Main Rd, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Pankaj Delicasies
reviews_list: Loved their Thali. It was so fulfilling and each item in the Thali was so delicious. If you are craving for some North Indian food,this place is a must visit

address: 1162, 22nd Main Rd, Siddanna Layout, Banashankari Stage II, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Ravi Gobi
reviews_list: The owner was so kind to give me half plate of mushroom manchurian to tast. The manchurian tastes so delicious and the sauce that goes into it imparts a bit of tart and tanginess to your palate. Overall, a great place foranhurian and Chinese in Bengaluru. Must try for all Bangaloreans.

address: BDA Complex, 433/30, 10th Main Rd,  above miniso, 4th T Block East, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Aditya Foods
reviews_list: Enjoyed a delightful family dining at this restaurant where the cuisine is both authentic and flavorful. The hospitality surpassed expectations, truly remarkable. Highly recommend

address: 1299, 50 Feet Main Rd, 2nd Stage, Kumaraswamy Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Bidadi Thatte Idly
reviews_list: I loved it The Idli's here are very soft and taste awesome with 2 types of chutney. You have an option for uddin wada or Masala wada with idli lll visit again.

address: PB No 413 & 185, Gandhi Bazaar, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: SLN Muddanna Palav
reviews_list: Randomly walking by the street of Gandhi bazar found this place and tried the sabbakki dose, sabbakki idli and Pulao. It was dam good, delicious and you will enjoy it until the last bite.

address: 95, Harikrishna building , 3rd cross, Landmark, Sampige Rd, next to pie mobiles, Malleshwaram, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560003
name: Bhagyalakshmi Butter and Gulkand Store
reviews_list: When it comes to gulkand this place comes as the most favourite and most recommended option in bangalore. They serve gulkand with butter, dry fruits, ice cream and fruits. They also have gulkand smeared inside bun option. Definitely one ll love this place after visit. Remember one ll love it only if they have sweet pallate.

address: 42/1, 15th Main Rd, MRCR Layout, MC Layout, Vijayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560040
name: Snack O Pedia
reviews_list: Excellent taste and very friendly workers and variety of options. ; The Veggie supreme burger is awesome. Lovely place. Nice ambiance as well. Totally a good place to eat and hangout

address: 34/1, 3rd floor and 4th floor 36th cross, 6th Main Rd, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560041
name: DYCE
reviews_list: Nestled on the third floor of a Jayanagar building, this restaurant offers a dining experience that seamlessly blends luxury with exclusivity. Despite leaning towards the higher end in terms of pricing, the establishment's exceptional ambiance justifies the expense, making it a standout choice for those seeking a refined dining experience in Bangalore

address: 747, 80 Feet Rd, 2nd Phase, Hosakerehalli Layout, Banashankari 3rd Stage, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560085
name: Nammura Oota
reviews_list: One of the best place to This is a good place to have lunch at midday. The food is very good. Estee had the meal. Only 50Rs. Everyone, give it at least once

address: Ground floor, 765, 8th Cross Rd, Govindaraja Nagar Ward, MC Layout, Vijayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560040
name: Shivara Thindi
reviews_list: Mini Rameshwaram Cafe ( Look and Ambience wise)Hygiene is super awesome.Food is really good with reasonable prices.Self service. Place available for sitting.Parking for 2 wheeler is not a problem.

address: Pipeline Rd, 1st Block, Hanumanthnagar, Banashankari 1st Stage, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560050
name: Mr.Manchurian
reviews_list: Gobi Manchurian & pepper dry items are very tasty & hygiene. ; Gobi manchurian was super& pepper dry is yammi.

address: 6, 10th Main Rd, Opposite Banshankari stage 1 post office, 2nd Block, SBM Colony, Banashankari 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560050
name: Brahmin Cafe
dish_liked: Masala Dosa, Idly, Kharabath, Sajige, All Healthy Foods
reviews_list: Everything about this place is amazing. Feels so authentic and down to earth. Food quality is awesome. Dishes keep on coming and it's worth every penny paid. They only serve full meals in afternoon. Place is usually crowded but they have ample seating space. Since it's an old building you can't expect a fancy ambience but the vibe is pleasant. Place is neat, clean and service is quick

address: 146&147, 7th Main, 27th Cross Rd, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Echakh Danah
reviews_list: One of the few good authentic Pure Vegetarian North Indian fine dine as well as takeaway restaurant very near to Jayanagar Metro station. ; Recently I and my friends had visited this restaurant for lunch and first we tried their different types of soups among them my favourite was veg wonton soup and starters were amazing especially the Mushroom Bomb . Main course was also good . In dessert we choose Sizzling Brownie.One of the best vegetarian restaurants in Jayanagar .

address: Ganesha Temple, 30th cross, and, near maiyas, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Ballary famous Cycle Khova
reviews_list: Cart is available just diagnol opposite to Maiyas . Ballari Famous Cycle Khova delivers a top-notch authentic taste, especially when enjoyed hot. They offer parcel services, and though the price is a bit high, the delightful taste makes it worth the expense. Definitely worth a try, especially for those who appreciate quality flavors.

address: No - 50 Ground floor, DVG Road, near Nagasandra Circle, NR Colony, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Nothing Before Coffee
reviews_list: I had a great experience at Nothing Before Coffee. I tried their choco shrappe, and it exceeded my expectations. It truly outshines other cafes in terms of taste. The service provided was also commendable, ensuring that my visit was enjoyable from start to finish. Additionally, I appreciated the inclusion of indoor games. Also, I noticed was that the space felt a bit cramped, it certainly won't deter me from visiting again in the future. I recommend this cafe for anyone looking for a good coffee shop in the city.

address: 225, 1st Main Road, Bull Temple Rd, Anandapuram, Chamrajpet, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560018
name: Sri Ganesh Refreshments
reviews_list: Tried benne masala, benne khali, kesari & chow chow bhath. Loved the chatni, you would like it too. Vada & idli were ok

address: 3rd Block, 2/2, Pattalamma Temple Rd, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Cafe Mondo
reviews_list: Cafe mondo is one of those casual F&B cafés, where you can hangout with your friends and families to spend some good amount of time - relaxing, unwinding and enjoying their delicious delicacies.

address: 57, 1st Floor, SLV Arcade 9th Main Road, 40th Cross Rd, 5th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560041
name: Masaledaar Desi Rasoi
dish_liked: Almond Broccoli Soup, Tawa Paneer Gravy
reviews_list: Highly recommended!!! I recently visited this amazing restaurant after watching few reels on insta. Honestly, one of the best Veg restaurants and everything about it is amazing. Food was so tasty and perfect for the taste buds, visited with my family and they loved it. Amazing service and beautiful ambiance. They have free Valet parking facilities.

address: 1/42, 11th Main Rd, NN Complex, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Basaveshwara Chats
reviews_list: Super delicious chats. Authentic taste, clean and hygienic place. Everything they use is home made and fresh. A must go place if you are a fan of chats.

address: 296, 24th Main Rd, JP Nagar 6th Phase, Ayodya Nagar, JP Nagar Phase 6, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: SSD Shashi Thatte Idly
reviews_list: Discover the legendary Shashi Thatte Idli from Bidadi, now available in the heart of JP Nagar at SSD Shashi Thatte Idli DJ's Dosa Co. ; Esrtwhile was known as DJs Dosa Company. Their menu primarily has many Dosa options along with other items like Idli, Paddus, rice item etc.

address: BASE [head office], opposite to shekhar hospital, Gandhi Bazaar, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Tirupati Naivedyam
reviews_list: Pakka temple prasadam. ; The food is good and the prices are very affordable. The people serving often are very busy as there are too many orders and the atmosphere is just open on the road.

address: 1198/A, Ground Floor, AVR Complex, Sy No. 54/01,Uttarahalli Kengeri Main Road Channasandra, Rajarajeshwari Nagar, Bangalore R R Nagara, B.B, M.P West, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560098
name: Biggies Burger
reviews_list: We can order nice veg and non veg burgers with couple of some meals combo at affordable price in Biggies burger. Very good ambience with good service. It's located at prime place.

address: 39, 15th Cross, 100 Feet Ring Rd, 4th Phase, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Klayworkz Barista
reviews_list: Klayworkz Barista Art Cafe" is a hidden gem we stumbled upon in JP Nagar. The aesthetic ambiance and vibrant atmosphere create a unique vibe. The highlight is the opportunity to craft your pottery, painting it in your favorite colors at surprisingly affordable prices.

address: 1040/A, 6th Main Rd, SBI Staff Colony, Hoshalli Extension, Stage 1, Vijayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560040
name: India Sweet House
reviews_list: One of the hygienic snacks/chats/sweets corner. Taste wise excellent. Tuesdays are buy one get one free offer (may be seasonal offer). Katori chat served will be royally garnished. Pan to plate Ghee jalebis are a must try here.

address: Shop No-2, Ground Floor, Shobha Arcade, 00 Feet, Outer Ring Rd, 7th Block, Hosakerehalli Layout, Banashankari 3rd Stage, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560050
name: Theobroma Bakery and Cakes
reviews_list: We tried a few things like Red velvet cupcakes, pastries, and brownies. While they were just okay taste-wise, the brownies stood out as very good and are a must-try for everyone who enjoys brownies.

address: 602, 15th Cross Rd, Jeewan Sathi Colony, 1st Phase, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Cafe Petriqor
reviews_list: It's a great hangout place.. We had peppermint tea, chamomile tea, expresso nachos and pizza. I just loved their blue chamomile tea and highly recommend it for anyone visiting this place. This is not the best place for coffee but their teas are just amazing. The ambience was great and I was astounded to see their succulent curtains. Their service was good.

address: 146, 6th C Main Road, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Naivedyam Veg
reviews_list: The food is mouthwatering! I tried idlis, vadas, Kashi halwa and ghee masala dose. The idlis were like clouds and I'm not exaggerating! Everything is served super hot and an abundant amount of chutney is provided with every dish. The masala dosa was fuelled with ghee and the fragrance will make you crazy! The prices are very low in my opinion and the ambience is very energetic! It doesn't have seating arrangements but I feel it adds to the charm of the place. Great experience, must visit for a Sunday breakfast!

address: 79/8, Diagonal Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001
name: Gufha
dish_liked: Non Veg Platter, Fried Ice Cream
reviews_list: Thos cave themed restaurant in Bangalore offers a superb dining experience with high-quality and generous portions of food. The unique cave-like atmosphere enhances the overall ambiance, creating a truly awesome dining environment. The location is excellent, and the waitstaff, dressed in distinctive attire, provide exceptional service. A perfect choice for anyone planning an outing in Bangalore, the restaurant also offers a variety of drinks to complement the experience. Overall, a fantastic place to enjoy both delicious food and a captivating atmosphere.

address: 637, 4th Cross Rd, RBI Layout, JP Nagar 7th Phase, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Puliyogare Corner
reviews_list: Today tasted first directly. I had puliogare and curd rice. For curd as side dish for puliogare it's yummy. Curd rice too good.

address: 22nd Main Rd, Siddanna Layout, Banashankari Stage II, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Banarasiya Cafe
reviews_list: Banarasiya Cafe is a true gem! From the moment you step in, the ambiance transports you to the heart of Banaras. The diverse menu, rich in traditional flavors, is a testament to their commitment to authenticity. Every dish is a masterpiece, and the staff's warm hospitality adds to the delightful experience. Highly recommend for a memorable culinary journey

address: Datta Complex, CJ Venkatesh Das Rd, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Sattvik Kitchen
reviews_list: The dining experience at this establishment was delightful, characterized by exceptionally fast service. While the menu options were limited, each choice proved to be excellent. However, it's worth noting that parking for four-wheelers might pose a challenge. Overall, it's a recommended spot to explore for a satisfying meal.

address: Anjanaswamy Layout, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Kavali
reviews_list: This restaurant is budget friendly and only veg restaurant in this area. They are open till 10:30pm and will be able to serve food mostly other than dosa at late nights. The cost is economical compared to the quantity, quality and taste that they serve. It's a good place to try dosas. They have only around four tables to sit, but a couple big tables to stand and eat if the crowd is more. Service is quick and they maintain the restaurant clean and tidy.

address: 2nd Block, Phase 1, 282/A -1, 12th Main Rd, 2nd Block, Phase 1, Hoskerihalli, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560050
name: Paddu Centre
reviews_list: Had one plate of paddu contains 6 pieces and two types of chutney costes 25 rs per plate.

address: NO 329, Ground Floor, GVS COMPLEX 10th A - Main, 22nd Cross Rd, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru 560011
name: Kulfilcious
reviews_list: Oooo. Aur kya chahiye. Falooda... Yummy, gudbud good... Kulfi variety superb. Smiling and warm team. What more... Its open till midnight. Enjoy the decor with old Hindi bollywood classic songs

address: No.244, 9th Main Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Dose Camp
reviews_list: Among the plethora of options available to enjoy a soul soothing south Indian breakfast in South Bangalore, I think this place is just about average. However, it's popular and generally crowded and expect a wait time of around 10-15 mins.

address: 15, Bull Temple, Road, opp. to Ramakrishna Ashrama Circle, next to HSBC Bank, Gandhi Bazaar, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Guru Raghavendra Chats
reviews_list: The tasty was good . We tried masala puri, pani puri and sev puri. I felt pani puri was okay , rest were good.

address: NR Colony, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Gobi Centre
reviews_list: Best place to have Gobi if you are in the surroundings of N.R colony. They will serve Gobi Manchurian, veg noodles, fried rice, Gobi noodles mix, Gobi fried rice mix and dry gobi. All are available in both full and half plates. Currently half plate costs 25/-and full plate costs 50/-. I loved all the items they serve especially with green chilli sauce. Both tomato and green chilli sauces are available, you can use both according to your liking. Dry Gobi is super, they will add spices like pepper powder, chat masala etc, which tastes awesome. Must try place, especially Gobi lovers...

address: No.115, 116, Gandhi Bazaar Main Rd, Gandhi Bazaar, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Udupi Sri Krishna Bhavan
reviews_list: Udupi Sri Krishna Bhavan is a South Indian Restaurant located in Gandhi Bazaar area just near Vidyarthi Bhavan. The place is of decent size and has normal seating of chairs and tables. It is located on the 1st floor of the building.

address: 69, Dr Rajkumar Rd, 2nd Block, Rajajinagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560010
name: Sri Venkateshwara Sweet House
reviews_list: Been visiting here from almost 20 years now! The chats taste has remained the same throughout! Extremely tasty, well made and well served! The cold badam milk might be subjective to people, but for me its a personal favourite!

address: 290, 38th Cross Rd, 5th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, 560041
name: Agarwal Foods
reviews_list: Food is great in taste. If you're north indian then you can get what you want. The atmosphere is also great here. The service is great too. The shop guys are decent. They treat their customers well. One thing I would like to say...if they can increase the quantity of the thing then it would be a plus.

address: 73, 17th E Main Rd, KHB Colony, 6th block, Koramangala, 560095
name: Ferrara-Osteria Diner
reviews_list: Gotta try the signature salted caramel ice cream and pasta is really good  ; Super place, tried their bumbo buns, with elaborate options of ice dreams, the pizza is really great, try week days.

address: 9/2, Nayanthara,4th cross,Netag Rd, Thyagaraja nagar, 560028
name: Litti Dhuska Wale
reviews_list: They make perfect Jharkand and Bihar cuisine.Must place visit.Food taste is authentic and genuinely priced ; Excellent Litti Chaukha, must try.

address: 532, 10th main, 36th cross rd, Jayanagar, Bengaluru-560041
name: Corner House
reviews_list: Iconic ice creams, must try DBC ; The 5 star rating is for ice cream and ice cream alone. Our favourites are below: DBC-5/5, HCF-5/5, Litchi with ice cream-5/5, Cake fudge-5/5

address: No 1316,D 9th cross, 9th main road, Opp. to Tirumalagiri Venkateshwara Temple, Marenahalli, 2nd Phase,J.P. Nagar, Bengaluru-560078
name: Harley's Fine Bakery
reviews_list: One of the best places for coffee, cakes ans snacks in town. The speciality is no egg cakes and pastries, no sugar, and world class taste ; Extremely pleasant atmosphere, good aesthetics, recommend to try their Russian Medovik desserts.

address: Forum Mall Rd, Anjanadri layout, Konankunte, Bengaluru-560062
name: Kebapci Forum South
dish_liked: Gelata Cheesecake, Mandi rice, Beyti Kebabs
reviews_list: Everything about this restaurant was just great! Scrumptious food! The whole experience from start to finish was exceptional! ; Love their Beyti kebabs. The servie is also very fast.

address: 2nd floor, Jyothi, GM Arcade, Basque bakery, 58, Jyoti Nivas College Rd, KHB Colony, 5th block, Bengaluru-560095
name: Basque Bakery
reviews_list: The freaking best cheesecake I have had in Bangalore till date. ; Really loved the place, would visit again for sure.

address: 265, 24th cross Rd, Siddana layout, Banashankari 2nd stage, Bengaluru-560070
name: Kidambi's Kitchen
reviews_list: Kidambi kitchen serving the best breakfast which was Coimbatore style and yes we loved it too!

address: 47/1,  JP Nagar, 3rd phase, 9th cross, 1st main road, JP Nagar Rd, Near Sony center, Bengaluru-560078
name: Cafe Khadya
dish_liked: Benne Masala dose, Ghee Podi Idli, Sukrunde
reviews_list: Amazing place to have south indian food, the ambience is nice enough ; Rates are affordable ; Good place to grab a bite after a walk in park! Tried dose, vada and chow chow bath, all were good.

address: 148, 18th Main Rd, BTM 2nd stage, Mahadeshwara Nagar, Stage 2, BTM Layout, Bengaluru, Near Olive Street Food cafe
name: Himalayan Momos
reviews_list: Gotta try veg cheese momos and chicken momos ; Very affordable to all the bachelor's and working people around

address: Uttarahalli KSRTC Layout Opp. Akash kunigal tatte idly
name: Yum Sum momos
reviews_list: Best place to have dry gobi ; Firstly tried manchow soup, which was good in taste and mainly dry gobi was really good and had a crispy texture

address: Uttarahalli Main road, Next to Royal Mart
name: Kalabhairaveshwara Tifen Center
reviews_list: Small food truck with simple menu and delicious Indian Street Food.

address: 153, 32nd E Cross Rd, BTB Area, 4th T bolck East, Jayanagar, Bengaluru-560041
name: Sri Vinayaka Juice Center
reviews_list: Must try place for amazing juice and milkshakes!

address: Metro Pillar No 66, 1319, Marenahalli Rd, Near sapphire honda showroom, JP Nagar 2nd Phase, Bengaluru-560078
name: Mulbagal Dosa Corner
dish_liked: Benne Masala dose, Ghee Podi Idli, Sabakki Idli
reviews_list: The best place I've had Mulbagal Masala dose in Bengaluru.

address: No.2465, 24th cross Rd, Sidanna Layout, Banashankari 2nd stage, Bengaluru-560070
name: Hara Fine Dine
dish_liked: Butter roti, Dal kichdi, Shahi thukda
reviews_list: All veg lovers here is a place to check out for dine in. It serves pure veg menu, their food is amazing.

address: Near Shekar Hospital,3rd cross Rd, Gavipuram Extn, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru-560019
name: Balaji Chat Corner
dish_liked: Cucumber noodles, Floating Pani puri, Samosa Chat
reviews_list: A nice place to have chats to please your cravings.

address: 1666A, Dr Rajkumar Rd, Mariappanapalya, Rajajinagar, Bengaluru-560021
name: Hotel Sagar
reviews_list: Mango milkshake at midnight is a must try ; It was just totaly worth the hype.

address: Ice Thunder, DVG Road, Gandhi Bazaar, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru-560004
name: Ice Thunder
reviews_list: Nice place to have breakfast, lunch, chats, juices, sundaes or just a great filter coffee.

address: Sampige Road, 3rd cross road, Malleshwaram, Bengaluru-560003
name: Hallimane
dish_liked: Mangalore buns, Masala dose, Ghee dose, Open dose
reviews_list: You get hot and good quality food even by morning 7/7:30 ; Love their combo breakfast and meals.

address: Railway station, 11th MAin Rd, Next to Malleshwaram, Bengaluru-560003
name: Sri Raghavendra Stores
reviews_list: One of the finest breakfast places around Malleshwaram ; Best food: Idli and Vada, Kharabath, Shavige and Kesaribath is worth a try.

address: Aunty's hotel, Chamrajpet, Bengaluru-560018
name: Aunty's hotel
reviews_list: 27 years old hotel and they are serving the best idli vade and chutney in town, the combo rice bath is super ; My favourite idli hotel in chamrajpet.

address: 186, 24th Cross Rd, Siddanna layout, Banashankari II Stage, Bengaluru-560070
name: SLV Coffee Bar
dish_liked: Filter coffee, Idli vada and chutney
reviews_list: Lovely food! Must try is the iconic idli vada with the awesome neer chutney ; Expect heavy rush during weekends, Pretty reasonable prices too, and the best part is you can refill the chutney

address: The Kittur Rani Chennama Flyover, RK Layout 2nd Stage, Banashankari, Bengaluru-560070
name: Dose Adda
reviews_list: Dosa Adda famous for early morning breakfast places opens at 3:30-4 and night by 8-8:30 PM. ; They serve delicious dose, pulav, thatte idli and vade.Place is always crowded.

address: Manjunath Colony, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bengaluru-560078
name: Chulha Chauki Da Dhaba
dish_liked: Lemon Chicken, Sweet lassi, Tandoori paneer tikka
reviews_list: Good place to have North Indian Food, Kulhqad lassi is a must try ; Great place which serves authentic north Indian food in Bangalore.

address: 52, 1st Floor, 33rd Sross Rd, Near Cafe Coffee Day, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru-560011
name: Meghana Foods Jayanagar
dish_liked: Chicken Biriyani, Mushroom Biriyani,  Golden Babycorn
reviews_list: This brand is my go to for the biriyanis. ; Great place in Jayanagar for a leisure hangout. Food is fantastic. The staff is good and prompt.

address: 32, Gandhi Bazaar Main Rd, Gandhi Bazaar, Basavanagudi, Karnataka-560004
name: Vidyarthi Bhavan
dish_liked: Masala Dosa, Kesaribath, Kharabath Upma, Sagu Masala Dosa
reviews_list: Vidyarthi Bhavan is unique and frozen in time. They serve very tasty dosas which are crispy and thick. I could taste plenty of ghee in sagu masala dosa that I ordered.

address: 595, 24th Cross Rd, Sidanna Layout, Banashankari II Stage, Bengaluru-560070
name: Food Stories
dish_liked: Pasta, Garlic Bread, Corn, Schezwan Paneer Roll
reviews_list: This place is a hidden gem! They serve delicious pasta, chinese, burgers and wraps at incredibly reasonable prices.

address: No 20, 4th Main Tata Silk Farm, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru-560004
name: Sadguru Chinese Food Corner
reviews_list: Must try paneer chilli, Gobi manchurian was decent ; This is must try, the food was worth every penny and more than anything else they use semi organic products.

address: 17th Main Rd, BTM 2nd Stage, MCHS Colony, BTM Layout, Bengaluru-560070
name: Olive Street Food Cafe
dish_liked: Mojito, Thick shakes, Mushroom sandwich, Chicken club sandwich
reviews_list: A decent place with reasonable prices. Ambience is good. Food is good especially their parathas and rolls.

address: Olety Hostel building, Sajjan Rao Circle, Near Janatha Hotel, Parvathipuram, Vishweshwarapura, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru-560004
name: Mr & Ms Corn

This’s the place to go, me and my wife tried unlimited chicken buffet which included - chi kebab, soup, pepper chi, biryani, parota, chi masala, rasam and a dessert. All the items were hot, spicy and delicious, I loved their parota, it was super soft, roasted with desi ghee. All of these items just for 350 INR. Here the pepper chicken and kebab are must try items. I definitely recommend this place if you’re in HSR Layout.

As of Now, it is semi self service where one places order at the counter and then they serve it. I visited the place in evening and they were out of stock for most of the desserts. But whatever I tried - tropical profiterole & caramel cereal eclairs, I absolutely loved them.Check out this place for some delicious gourmet desserts and hot chocolates. The place gives very cozy and comfort vibes. The aesthetics are very pretty. As of Now, it is semi self service where one places order at the counter and then they serve it. I visited the place in evening and they were out of stock for most of the desserts. But whatever I tried - tropical profiterole & caramel cereal eclairs, I absolutely loved them.

address: 296, Ram Towers, 100 Feet Ring Road, Banashankari, Bangalore, Bengaluru, Karnataka
name: 1947 Restaurant
reviews_list: Went there for a family & friend's dinner outing. Good option for a pure vegetarian group. Tandoori baby corn was good. Rabdi kulfi was finger licking. Staff is courteous and friendly. Overall good experience.Loved the food , it was very tasty & served well. If you want to have a good North indian food , you must visit this place.

address: 31/7 Loyola Layout, Victoria Road Richmond Town, Bangalore
name: Water monkey cafe
reviews_list: Really enjoyed my experience in this small little cafe, quiet place to read a book . Really enjoyed the coffee .The basque cheese cake was just out of the world. chef Rolex made amazing pulled pork sandwich.

address: 6 Hulimavu Gate, JP Nagar Rd, near Begur - Hulimavu Road, Arch, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560076
name: Unlimited food factory
reviews_list: All the dish out here are tasty and value for money the ice cream tasted good.Extreme service and quality best place

address: Jayanagar 4th block bus station, 9th Main Rd, next to reservation counter, 4th T Block East, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560041
name: Desi Masala
reviews_list: Nice buffet and service Good food and quality Worth for price . Do visit Desi Masala.Decent, affordable food with a friendly atmosphere. Location is good but there is a lack of parking space otherwise worth trying once.

address: 235, 9th Main Rd, Sector 6, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560102
name: Hellan's boba
reviews_list: The Taiwan taro is the best here, it's price is around Rs170 but really liked the taste.Really good place to have boba. They have real authentic bobas rather than some other places which give cheap ones. They are affordable compared to other boba places. The shop is open till 12.30AM midnight

address: Prestige Icon, 4121/S HAL, 2nd Stage Kodihalli, Jeevan Bima Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560008
name: Koko
reviews_list: One of the best restaurants serving Pan Asian cuisine in Bengaluru. Cocktails are inNovative . Service is surely matching a fine dine experience. Mr Ravi served us and had good time .A must visit place in Bangalore for all Japanese cuisine lovers. Great location, lovely ambience and excellent service elevates the overall experience. Menu has plenty of choices unlike other Japanese restaurants. We loved starters, main course and the dessert. Cocktails and Mocktails were awesome too. Special mention to Ravi for his excellent customer service.

address: 17th Main Rd, KHB Colony, 5th Block, Koramangala, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560095
name: Tuk Tuk Thai
reviews_list: Loved the vibe here. The ambience of this place is great. Food here is so tasty and amazing. Even though the place was a bit crowded, service was prompt and fast. It is recommended to book seats in advance since they usually have a 10-15 mins waiting time. They have authentic Pan Asian food and its all veg so you can enjoy lots of delicacies and flavors. The staffs were polite and well mannered. Overall the experience was awesome.Totally loved this place. Food was very delicious. Tried everything for the first time. They have Malaysian, thai, Japanese, and Vietnamese dishes.

address: SRK Towers, JP Nagar Rd, Krishnaraju Layout, Amalodbhavi Nagar, Bilekahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560076
name: Mykos
reviews_list: A very cute place that I had been wanting to go to and it did Not disappoint. The ambience is unique and the food is equally good. Prices are Not too expensive and the service is great as well (shoutout to our server- Boisat!)This is one of the place where I would come everytime I visit Bangalore. Such a nice ambience, food is top Notch and affordable. Staff is great. I would recommend everyone to go there once.

address: 4th, B Block, 82, 7th Cross Rd, KHB Block Koramangala, Koramangala 4-B Block, Koramangala, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560034
name: Just Loaf
reviews_list: This is an awesome place for both formal and informal meet ups! Food was awesome! We Tried Cold press Juice, Salad, Korean Garlic Bun, Apple tart, falafel sandwich, sloppy Joe, chicken rice bowl. The vegetarian options for food is very less and the chef mentioned they would be adding soon, since, there is high demand. All of them were very good! There is couple of car and few bike parking. ,Possibly they have valet.Food absolutely delicious! Korean chicken wings was the best! Loved the vibe of the place! Surely going back again!

address: 2nd Floor, Forum Rex Walk, Brigade Rd, Shanthala Nagar, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560001
name: Homiga
reviews_list: The food was very good, as was the service. Rajat was very sweet and helpful. Had a great time. Expensive but the quantity and taste are top Notch. The interiors could be better designed.,Great restaurant in Bengaluru. Amazing food, nice staff who can recommend what to order. They prepare the meal fresh right in front of you. Very tasty! Go and try yourself

address: 3798, 7th Main Rd, Motappapalya, Indiranagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560038
name: Neon Market
reviews_list: Food is great but seems like the quantity is less compare to the price... One time visit would probably be good... The staffs are very friendly and suggests food as well. Ms. Manasa is proactive in helping the customers. Thank you for your hospitality.,I absolutely loved their Oreo croissant, chicken braised toast and Shakshuka. CappucciNo could have been better though, too strong for my taste but if you’re someone who likes their coffee strong then definitely go for it. The presentation was perfect.I won’t talk about ambience because everyone already is and it is pretty cool.

address: 438, 18th Main Rd, 6th Block, Koramangala, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560095
name: Kappa Chakka Kandhari
reviews_list: Tried their Coconut Prawn, Mutton coconut fry, Ramapuram Chicken gravy, Palada and Lemon Mint cooler, Nanari drinks. All dishes were fantastic (except chicken gravy was bit bland and cardamom was lil overpowering, but Not bad). Would definitely recommend the above dishes than going for tasting menu.,Kappa Chakka Kandhari tantalizes taste buds with authentic Kerala flavors, reminiscent of childhood memories and home-cooked delights, it delivers an exquisite culinary journey, capturing the essence of Kerala with every dish. A must-visit for Kerala food enthusiasts seeking Nostalgia around bangalore.

address: Shop No 15 - 15A, First Floor, Phoenix Mall of Asia, 560092, Indra Nagar, Hebbal, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560092
name: Andrea's Brasserie
reviews_list: It is a nice place with a lot of variety in cuisines. We tried sushi and pizza with coffee and they were delicious. The staff is nice, as well.,Amazing food and amazing taste. Totally different than conventional food joints. Will be visiting again soon. Ordered a platter and pizza both were amazing.

address: 339, 20th Cross Rd, CQAL Layout, Hebbal, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560092
name: Ameil Gourment
reviews_list: The food is absolutely delicious, cooked with elegance and generous. The chef is passionate, and you can truly feel it on the plate. Highly recommended for everyone who appreciates good cuisine .,Had the most amazing experience at Amiel Gourmet CSE outlet wherein we were lucky eNough to have food from the chef himself. I had arranged a catering menu for a special team dinner & my entire team was really happy with the food & the service and have been commending me on choosing this place. Food was so tasty and authentic to the cuisine and all kudos goes to the chef & the team for managing that. Special mention to the branch manager Snehashish along with the wait staff as we were served with the utmost attention & warmth. I will be back again and i am sure my colleagues too

address: 322/1, Chinmaya Mission Hospital Rd, Near Indiranagar Metro Station, Binnamangala, Stage 1, Indiranagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560038
name: Maravanthe Coastal Cuisine
reviews_list: Loved the food. Tried their Neer dosa, chicken ghee roast, makarel rawa tawa fry, fish thali, sol kadhi. Everything tasted good. Bit on the pricey range. I think it's a good place for sea food lovers to enjoy while in bglore.,This is the best place to visit in Bangalore if you are craving for an authentic mangalorean cuisine.. the sea foods are really fresh and delicious, my all time favourite is ghee roasted prawns. Try here Neer dosa with chicken sukka..that’s a must thing to eat..you can try kori roti which is very crispy rice papads, then in desert u can go for ragi manni which i really enjoyed

address: Ground Floor, Goenka Chambers, 19th Main St, 2nd Phase, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Societe Rangoon
dish_liked: Burmese chilli mushroom soup,Matcha bubble tea
reviews_list: We tried out the lunch here with 4Pax, the food was excellent. We couldn't ask for more. Awan served us with her best and it was indeed a fine dining experience. Highly recommend.,A very quaint and interesting place in JP nagar ... Tried the falafel soup which was really nice interesting take on lentil soup with falafel which was very good in itself... Next tried the khow suey which was again really creamy coconut gravy with Noodles topped with chicken in addition to this we tried the mushroom rice which was ok interesting flavors had to really look for the mushrooms, I would Not order the same again finally ended with the sago desert which was decent

address: 85/1, Dr DVG Road, Near National College, Basavanagudi, Bangalore, Bengaluru, Karnataka
name: Mahalakshmi  Tiffin Room
reviews_list: Old school tiffin room. Nostalgic ambiance. The special masala dosa was superb. The dosa was accurately crispy. The aloo palya was just the right flavors. The sambar could have been better.,To be honest, we had to come here because Vidhyaarthi Bhavan was closed. It's just a km walk from there but to our surprise, it was amazing.Idly was so soft. Dosa was Normal.and the Kali dosa was too soft and too good.It's a great and affordable breakfast place.Highly recommended.

address: 5th Floor, 1 MG Road Mall, MG Road, Bangalore
name: 2 Moons
reviews_list: Excellent food, and I absolutely loved the Gimlet. A million thanks to Rohit for your quick and seamless service and food suggestions - you really made the time spent absolutely amazing and totally worth it!,Good service by chandrajeet Debnath . Will surely visit for the service

address: 10/5, 6th floor, Rathnam's Complex, Kasturba Road, Mahatma Gandhi Rd, Lavelle Road, Bangalore
name: One8 Commune
reviews_list: The mushroom dimsums and the chicken souvlaki was amazing , the staff is friendly and the hospitality was great. A must visit place for family and friends.,amazing food and ambience, friendly staff overall enjoyed every bit of it.

address: 5th floor, 1 MG Road Mall 560008, Bengaluru, MG Road, Bangalore
name: Juliet
reviews_list: Everything about this place is quite fabulous. The location, the ambience, the service! But the food is appalling! Both the portion size and the taste. Very average on both fronts. Tried the goat cheese beet salad which was sour beyond imagination. And the pizza tastes average and the size is a joke. Long story short; this won’t be my go to place for meals for sure.,I loved the ambience and the food. I like the service. Well maintained place. Staff were very cooperative. Totally I enjoyed. Every penny I spent was worthy.

address: Ground Floor, Cosmopolitan Club, 3rd Block, 22nd Cross, Jayanagar, Bangalore
name: Subz
reviews_list: Excellent food for veg lovers. This is a buffet style dedicated to vegetarians. You'll find a lot of foods that you can choose. The food was great and hygienic. Did Not try dessert. Ambience was good. Buffet cost Rs 580 per head. Valet parking available. Try it, you'll love it.,The food was good. The atmosphere could have been better. Also the price is high for the varieties offered.

address: 3, 8th Main Road, Koramangala 4th Block, Bangalore
name: The Hole in the Wall Cafe
reviews_list: Quite decent ambience and crowd. Try out some English cuisine for breakfast. The Pan cakes and Cold coffee is a must have. While the restaurant is on the main road, the parking spot if just in the next Street. Recommended are bikes instead of cars.,You might have to wait a bit, but it won't be long and will be worth. Great English menu, full of English breakfast options, waffles and much more on those lines. Everything looks and tastes great. Service is quick and really nice. Atmosphere is of a cute little cafe, but totally packed all the time. And on top of it, it's Not expensive at all. Must try if you're in the area, I'd recommend traveling a bit for this too. Great for vegetarians, much better for Non-vegetarians.

address: 10, Shanthala Nagar, Museum Road, Church Street, Bangalore
name: Amintri
reviews_list: If you have a sweet tooth that never stops nagging, you'll find your heaven here. They have so many mouth-watering and eye-popping pastries and desserts that you'll need a bigger stomach. And a bigger wallet. This place is quite popular, expect waiting time on weekends.,One of the best places to have desserts. Both the pull me up cakes are a must have. The seating is also clean and spacious. Found the hot chocolate Not to my liking, but it was good. Cheesecakes are also worth a try

address: 50/1, Near Jyothi Nivas College, Koramangala 5th Block, Bangalore
name: Khawa Karpo
reviews_list: Crazy good momos. Add mayo maybe? Loved it regardless.,If you love tibetian food, this is heaven for you. The food is really good in taste. The only problem is it's too narrow.

address: 11, 80 Feet Road, Near SBI, Koramangala 1st Block, Bangalore
name: Bistro Claytopia
reviews_list: This place has an very beautiful and happening environments which offers one of the most beautiful experiences. They offer you an art work while you have you food with you friends. They sale this plain white painted clay objects in which you could paint. The price for clay materials starts from 500 and goes upto 3to4k base on your interest. And for each clay materials only fixed number of paint are provided and you will be charged extra in case if you need extra colors to get painted. The place is almost busy everytime with everyone painting and spending their own time. And the food in here is quite decent where the menu is limited to certain dishes. And at last the painting which you made should be handed over to them and they would undergo an process of glazing your art which gives polishing looks and makes it strong. After the product is ready they would call you and you could go and collect them with the bill they have given.,This is one of the fancy cafe in the Koramangala side. Those who are in to art and painting its the best place for them. For whatever you want to paint has to be paid. Quality and quantity of the food was on the average side. Consider this place if you've eNough time to spend here or else it won't worth it. This place gets crowded at the peak timings so better to be reach little early and grab the seats.

address: 460, 2nd Cross, Krishna Temple Road, Indiranagar, Bangalore
name: MilaNo Ice Cream
reviews_list: One of my favorite places to have desserts. The Gelato ice cream is delicious. The dual flavour combo with the waffle cone is the best. There are a lot of varieties to choose from and the prices are reasonable. It would get crowded after 8pm especially in the weekends. Definitely worth visiting.,Visited this place as I came to kNow that Italian chef started this place. Living in Europe for the past 4 years, I was curious to explore gelato here. Creaminess was above average, sugar is perfect, texture could be better. By the way Italian gelato is never measured with a scoop it’s served with love and the way they put it on a cone is an art. Come tasted good by the way! Tiramisu was good and lemon pie was average

address: 839/1, 2nd Floor, Binnamangala First Stage, Indiranagar, Bangalore
name: Yuki
reviews_list: One of the best places for some delicious Pan Asian food!! Loved the dimsums,pineapple fried rice, Noodles, chicken salad , pad thai and desserts! Lovely ambience and service is definitely a cherry on the cake at this place!! ,Yuki is an awesome place! Food and ambience are really amazing. I will recommend this cocktail bar to everyone. Must try their Matcha LIIT. Will surely visit here again. Overall service was also very quick :)

address: B Block, Block B, 539, Kundalahalli Main Rd, AECS Layout - C Block, AECS Layout, Marathahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560037

address: No. 279/77 27th cross, 10th Main Rd, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011

reviews_list: An affordable chat centre at Jayanagar 4th block. The taste is really good compared to Big Misha Pedha. Responsible staff and hygiene food.,Vasavi chant is old and very famous in jayanagar. Mildly spiced and has unique taste to its own.

address: 1, MN Krishna Rao Rd, Basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: New Lalbagh Grand
reviews_list: You can definitely recognise the location of this restaurant with its name. This Lalbagh Grand Veg is located near Lalbagh. The menu is all South Indian. Usually it gets crowded during mornings and in evenings due to people who visit the park for walks and jogs.

address: #20 4th main tata silk farm basavanagudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560004
name: Sadhguru chinese food corner
reviews_list:
Gobi, panner manchuri is dam awesome. Worth for money. And No flavors are used. Now have come out with new dishes. All are literally good.,Great place even before reNovation. After reNovation, new items have been added to the menu.
Food is splendid, ambience is cosy, but the crowd results in a delay. Go with company and you'll have a great time.

address: 132 ,Dollars Colony ,7th main, 16th Cross Rd, behind MK Ahmed Bazar, JP Nagar 4th Phase, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Kinya coffee
reviews_list: Excellent coffee with a nice ambiance. Snacks are worth a try as well. Overall a great neighbourhood coffee spot.,I personally love to sit outdoor and have coffee and I found my place. Best coffee shop and ambiance

address: 309, 7th Main Road, HRBR Layout, 2nd Block, Kalyan Nagar, Bangalore
name: HiSeoul
reviews_list: Best Korean restaurant in North Bangalore. Menu is well crafted and provides options for all types of vegetarian and Non vegetarian choices. We have our favorites like chicken cutlet gimbap, chicken wings, samyugsal, ramyun and bibimap. They also give a set bunchan as complimentary. Excellent service compliments the delicacies.,Had a great fulfilling lunch at this korean place. Even though I personally do like some K-pop bands, it was good to see their decor devoid of the popular culture and instead embracing tradition. They serve complimentary starter along with the side dishes for the meal you order. Side dishes have amazing flavours and the food portions are huge. Be mindful of how much you want to eat before ordering multiple dishes. Definitely recommended if you like Korean food.

address: 27th Main Rd, opposite Sunlife hospital, Sector 2, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560102
name: Ichi ramen bowl
reviews_list: The ramen was very tasty and also there other food stalls in this space. The owner is very friendly and nice. We tried the Samyang 1X spicy bowl and I'm going to be "thinking" about it for a while! The owner is really friendly and helped us make a selection

address: 1846/72, D Block, 4th Cross, 3rd Stage, Rajajinagar, Bangalore
name: Sagar Restaurant
reviews_list: Visited specifically for the mango milkshake priced at Rs.150. The shake was impressively thick, served generously in a sizable glass. Its richness and real mango pulp content made it Not only a refreshing drink but also quite filling. The taste was delightful, and the overall experience was positive.,This place is closer to Mahakavi Kuvempu Road Metro Station. Had ordered the legendary Mango Milkshake which was absolutely worth it.    Pav Bhaji, Fafda and Jalebi's was also good. Disappointed with the Dabeli as No pomegranate fruit was added. Overall it was a good meal, to enjoy.

address: Green Avenue, Plot 1, ITPL Main Rd, EPIP Zone, Brookefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560037

Every dish was incredibly delicious, but the standout recommendations are the ghee dosa and the aromatic filter coffee. The flavors were exceptional, making it a delightful culinary experience. If you haven't been here yet, it's definitely worth a visit for a memorable taste journey.

Located in Rajkumar road

Good service.Food tasted good.

Chutneys, kuruma, sambar are also really tasty. Their service is excellent

address: #303, Ashok Terrace, 5th Main Rd, Indira Nagar 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560038

reviews_list: Recently visited Zama Bakery and was thoroughly impressed! Tried their chicken pide, cigar adana kebab, Fateh hummus, and chicken roll, and each dish was a delight.
