Would definitely recommend a visit for delicious, authentic flavors!,Tried this place last week . It was my first time trying Turkish cuisine. It was so flavourful n filling . Loved the garlic sauce the wraps and kababs were so juicy

address: Lake View Farm, Varthur Main Road, Whitefield Main Rd, Siddapura, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066
name: Farmhouse Kitchen & Bakery
reviews_list: We used to like this place a lot because it was in a nice farm set up. However the farm is Not well maintained these days. All stores except this restaurant has moved away. Entry and exit is via a very small gate..Farmhouse Kitchen & bakery is a nice restaurant situated in a small farm. It showcases a great amount of British Architecture. It offers a nice cozy experience where you could work, relax or enjoy with friends or family. I had a chicken strogaNoff and personally loved it. It had a creamy and delicious sauce with steamed rice. The food was great and the portion size is also pretty decent.

address: Link Rd, BDA Layout, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560068
name: Coal Spark
reviews_list: I recently revisited this place after a gap of three months, hoping for the same delightful experience. However, I must say, the grilled fish, Mexican grilled chicken, porotta, and various chicken curries were quite average this time. The food isn't bad, but it fell short of the previous quality, leaving me disappointed. On a positive Note, the service and ambiance remain very nice. I hope the kitchen standards catch up for a more consistent dining experience.,Good food, must try. Lots of veg Non veg options available. Friendly staff. Clean washroom. Fast service. Parking is Not so smooth for a 4 wheeler but 2 wheelers can be parked inside.

address: 183, 28, 2nd Main Road, 7th Block, Jayanagar, Bangalore

reviews_list: Pure vegetarian restaurant, We had been for lunch, place was bit crowded, AC wasn’t working, service is slow, food is decent, mocktails are average, chat is a must try, atmosphere is decent we tried smoked chilly pineapple, dahi chat, masala papad, Cajun paneer. Street parking is available.,Good ambience, courteous but naive staff, food is average in taste, same goes for mocktails as well. Visit if you're close by.

address: 81, 5th Cross Rd, Vyalikaval, Kodandarampura, Malleshwara, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560003

The besan was tasteless, baby corn was raw, you will only get the taste of raw capsicum, carrot and onion garnished on top.
Hard working people and the shop is doing great business but will give 3 star for bhajji's.

super breakfast ge illi banni.

name: Sidappa hotel
reviews_list: Wait time is a bit long and you get a lot of intermediate food before the star of the show arrives - the masala dosa. Its light, crispy and delicious. Homemade food and No use of chemicals. Worth waiting in the que.

address: 7/1, Edward Rd, off Queens Road, Vasanth Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560052
name: Champaca Bookstore
reviews_list:
If reading is your favourite hobby to do , and you want a peaceful atmosphere do visit , champaca . Located on top of a private residence champaca offers you a serene and calm atmosphere. You can read books from their collection, buy them , and enjoy ur favourite read over a cup of coffee or tea. They also sell bookmarks and other book related stuffs .,It is a delightful blend of cozy bookstore and charming cafe. The amazing view enhances the serene atmosphere, perfect for indulging in a good read or a delightful meal.
Also, Their carrot cake is a standout - moist, rich, and utterly delicious. It's a must-try for anyone visiting. Coupled with friendly staff and a unique menu, my experience at Champaca was both relaxing and memorable.

The concept was great. Though, they'll only have desserts or hot beverages in food menu. But, all of them are worth it.

Highly recommend for a peaceful escape into the world of books and culinary delights!

Whether you're a cat lover or simply looking for a unique cafe experience, I highly recommend checking it out. Good food

dish_liked: Cream of broccoli,pepper and curry leaf lotus stem
reviews_list:
Nice Vegetarian restaurant with some different menu. Food was good and Not too expensive. Good ambiance, tasty food. Can relish the food with differences in taste and presentation. Good place for vegetarian and Jain food lovers.
Vegetarian options: Not too many varieties, but can try everything.,This casual dining gem offers a delightful pan-Pan Asian experience with a focus on Thai cuisine. What sets it apart is the inclusion of Jain food, catering to diverse preferences. The flavorsome dishes and welcoming ambiance make it a go-to choice for both vegetarians and enthusiasts of authentic Pan Asian cuisine.

address: 170, 170, 2nd Cross Rd, SBI Colony, Koramangala, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560047
name: TAG restaurant
reviews_list: Good food but service should get better. The biryanis were good! We tried their special biryanis and they were good. Parking for 4 wheelers is slightly a concern, as it is a street parking. Decent rest rooms. They do provide delivery services, for nearby locations. Overall a decent place for Andhra Style of food.,A wonderful place to dine at, you get all varieties of dishes to savor the taste of Andhra style cuisine. One of the best place for south Indian food. For spicy lovers it is top-Notch restaurant.

name: Poonam Sweet Center
reviews_list: Excellent shop for Rajasthani sweets, owner is Bikaner. I was looking for spongy Ghewar and this was the place. Enjoyed sweets and savoury

address: Traffic Police Station, 176, New Diagonal Rd, near Jayanagar, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Doosri Biwi
reviews_list: Their chaaps are soft, layered and juicy. We tried our all time favourite malai chaap, and it was good. The only issue was that our malai chaap had achari flavour in it, but good thing is that when we raised it to the staff they were ready to replace it. Anyway, we went on with it. They probably cooked the achari in the same pan.

address: 146, 6th C Main Road, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Chai Kraft
dish_liked: Purple Tea El Classic , Blue Tea, Sandwich
reviews_list: Nice place to have different varieties of tea. The essence of ginger is there in almost every tea. But the tea with milk are good. The w/o milk options are quite confusing. The blue and purple tea are worth a try. The dum chai is good. The lemon tea is awesome except for the lemon ginger, don't try it.

address: Lakshmi Venkateshwara Complex, Elephant Rock Rd, Jaya Nagar 1st Block, Jayanagar 3rd Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: Kunkal Coffee
reviews_list: A good and new filter coffee shop. Mom tried filter coffee here for Rs.20 and she liked it. We also bought a coffee packet. Nice aroma and strong. Freshly made coffee on spot. They also serve boost. This is right next to Max, Jayanagar. This coffee is from chikkamangalur.

address: 111, 71st Cross Rd, 1st Stage, Kumaraswamy Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078
name: Chandranna Thindi Mane
reviews_list: Good and affordable food available.Ambients are also fine, self service only. Can be considered as budget friendly dine-in for vegetarian's

address: 21, Kathriguppe Main Road 4th Block, 3rd Phase, Banashankari 3rd Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560085
name: Anna Kuteera
reviews_list: Yeah good hotel indeed but Costlier too. Very much costlier. They do provide quality food, they do have good views. People looks like hygiene and clean. So. Many North eastern people works here. Though hotel run by South Indian most of the people working here are North eastern. So hotel represent blend of whole India.Hotel provide good service to the local. Local cousine is good. Taste appears good. Good to visit once a while..

address: 716/2, 22nd Cross Rd, K.R.Road, Banashankari Stage II, Banashankari, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560070
name: Mitti Café
reviews_list: From the moment you walk in until the time you leave, the experience is nothing short of delightful. The hospitality here is truly top-notch. Tried the kokum juice and nachos, and the nachos with fantastic toppings were a standout.

address: 162, 5th Main Rd, 4th Block, Jayanagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560011
name: RR Vatika
reviews_list: Limited seating. We went on a weekday afternoon and there was no crowd. Service was quick. Ordered Royal Punjabi Thali priced at 199rs and all the dishes served tasted fresh. Phulka's served were hot. Do not understand the reason behind serving half papad in a 199rs thali. I think the price for the quantity served in the thali is on a higher side.
